creator: blaz@si.FreeBSD.org
text:
Update port to 0.0.7b4.
New pkg-install script which replaces old createuser script.
pkg-install is now correctly run on package installation,
also old createuser script used hardcoded uid which clashed
with postgresql port.
Fix permissions on ${LOCALBASE}/var/netsaint/rw directory
so that the cgi script actually works out of the box.
Change maintainer e-mail address.

Fix: cvs add pkg-install
cvs remove scripts/createuser
